meta.title: Convert audio and video to text online for free
meta.description: Votxt lets you upload audio and video files or paste YouTube Links, quickly turning them into text with AI. It also creates summaries, mind maps, and lets you export the text in different formats.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page may have moved or the address may be incorrect. Return to Votxt or browse the transcription tools.

app.tagline: Audio and video into text you can actually use.
app.empty: Start with a file or link. Your transcript and AI workspace will appear here.
app.headline: Convert Audio & Video to Text
app.subheadline: Votxt lets you upload audio and video files or paste YouTube Links, quickly turning them into text with AI. It also creates summaries, mind maps, and lets you export the text in different formats.
app.localUploadHint: Audio: amr, awb, flac, m4a, mka, mp2, mp3, oga, ogg, wav, weba, webm, wma. Video: 3gp, mkv, mov, mp4, mpg, ts, webm, wmv.
app.terms: By using Votxt, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
app.workflowTitle: How to Convert Audio & Video to Text?
app.workflowUploadText: Upload audio and video files from your device or paste an online video link.
app.workflowTranscribeText: Click Transcribe and wait. Most files finish quickly while progress updates in the workspace.
app.workflowExportText: Export TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, CSV, and VTT, or create a share link for others to view.
app.summaryEmpty: Generate insights after a transcript is ready.
app.mindMapEmpty: Mind map nodes will appear here.
app.name: Name
app.recordHint: Recording creates a WebM audio file in the browser, then uses the same upload and transcription queue.
app.noTranscript: Live progress and transcript output will appear here after a task is created.
